body:
To update for the AMIP/CMIP environment split in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1775. For now I left in the experiments/ClimaEarth/ environment in ClimaCoupler.jl so downstream tests don't break, but it will be removed soon.

## Content
- [x] `experiments/ClimaEarth/` --> `experiments/AMIP/`
- [x] `experiments/AMIP/test/runtests.jl` --> `experiments/test/runtests.jl`
title: update ClimaCoupler env in downstream test

body:
This PR implements part of #4234 
## PR Summary
This PR introduces the Setups module (src/setups/) as the new canonical location for simulation initial conditions, replacing the legacy InitialConditions module. It uses a two-layer architecture:

- Layer 1 (physics-only): Each setup implements`center_initial_condition`, `face_initial_condition`, and `surface_condition`, returning plain NamedTuples with no knowledge of the atmos model. Setups can also implement optional SCM forcing methods: `subsidence_forcing`, `large_scale_advection_forcing`, and `coriolis_forcing` to completely unify cases like Bomex, Rico, DYCOMS etc. This will probably be further extended for other setup needs.
- Layer 2 (model-aware, setup-independent assembly): prognostic_variables.jl converts the physical state NamedTuple into model-specific prognostic variables by dispatching on moisture, microphysics, and turbconv model types.

**ICs migrated so far:** Bomex, Rico, GCMDriven (3 of ~27 IC types)

### New files created within src/setups:

- Setups.jl: module definition, abstract type, interface functions, initial_state glue
- common.jl: physical_state, perturb_coeff, thermodynamic helpers
- hydrostatic.jl: utilities duplicated from ICs: hydrostatic_pressure_profile, ColumnInterpolatableField
- prognostic_variables.jl: Layer 2 assembly with dispatch on all model types
- overwrite_from_file.jl: shared infrastructure for field-level ICs
- Bomex.jl, Rico.jl, GCMDriven.jl: individual setup implementations

### Integration path in type_getters.jl and model_getters.jl:

- get_setup_type() returns a Setups.X(...) or nothing
  - When setup is not nothing, use setup to build initial state and surface state
  - When nothing: falls through to legacy get_initial_condition / get_surface_setup
- get_scm_coriolis, get_subsidence_model, and get_large_scale_advection_model all take an optional Setup used to set the proper config.

### Remaining IC Types to Migrate:

Pointwise column ICs with prognostic_tke
- GABLS
- Soares
- DYCOMS_RF01
- DYCOMS_RF02
- TRMM_LBA
- SimplePlume
- ISDAC (also takes perturb_initstate)

Pointwise ICs with perturb_initstate
- DryBaroclinicWave (also takes deep_atmosphere)
- MoistBaroclinicWave (also takes deep_atmosphere)
- MoistBaroclinicWaveWithEDMF (also takes deep_atmosphere)
- DecayingProfile
- MoistAdiabaticProfileEDMFX

No-arg ICs
- ConstantBuoyancyFrequencyProfile
- IsothermalProfile
- DryDensityCurrentProfile
- RisingThermalBubbleProfile
- PrecipitatingColumn
- RCEMIPIIProfile_295 / _300 / _305 (this can probably be unified further)
- ShipwayHill2012

File-based / field-level overwrite ICs
- MoistFromFile (file path as IC name)
- ReanalysisTimeVarying (InterpolatedColumnProfile)
- WeatherModel
- AMIPFromERA5
title: Add Setups module to replace ICs and unify config setup
